allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace demo seeders with production data seeders

Remove DemoDataSeeder with fake client data and replace with
individual seeders reflecting actual database records: 6 real clients,
3 pricing presets, 11 invoices with full line items and status history,
2 GitHub repos, 1 server, 6 reports, 6 monitored endpoints, and 6
subscription bills. All seeders use updateOrCreate for safe re-runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
